{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Guardians from Bel Calem
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Guardians from Bel Calem]] are pursuing [[Alin]] and [[Gilad]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c16">''House of Blades'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|"Guardians from Bel Calem," Gilad whispered. "They've caught our scent."<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c16" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate groups]]
